summary: 2 years of experience as a Junior Recruiter. Focused on measurable business outcomes in i̇nsan kaynakları / talent acquisition with hands-on experience in Performance Management, SAP SuccessFactors, Training, Onboarding.
title: Junior Recruiter

experiences.description: Used Training, LinkedIn Recruiter, Employer Branding to delivered measurable performance improvements. Improved a core KPI by 3x and documented repeatable operating practices for the team.

Coordinated releases with stakeholders and reduced operational risk
